rules: Newer upload time does not override explicit authority.
Binary-different PDFs may still be exact content duplicates.
TeacherBrain artifacts are quarantined from LICHTREICH runtime architecture.
CURRENT_REFERENCE is not proof of deployment or media availability.

artifacts.reason: Declares ACTIVE_CANONICAL_CONTEXT but points to Canonical v05, old audio status and active multilingual voice family; replaced by MEM-001.

v09 rebuild/review configuration subordinate to Canonical v10 and final rights review.

TeacherBrain-specific PostgreSQL schema. It must not be applied to LICHTREICH/Neon or used to create a parallel source of truth.
